title: Point of Sale
description: Add items quickly, review the cart, and complete the order.

menu.title: Menu
menu.description: Tap a dish to add it to the cart.
menu.drinksDescription: Soft drinks, water, coffee, and more.

cart.title: Cart
cart.emptyDescription: Add dishes from the menu to start an order.

startDay.title: Start day
startDay.description: The POS is not available yet because the day has not been started. Start the day to unlock the point of sale and begin working.
startDay.balanceDescription: Enter the cash amount you are starting with today. This will be used as the opening balance for the day.
startDay.balanceHint: If you do not need an opening balance, you can disable it from the Account page.
startDay.noBalanceDescription: Opening balance is disabled for this account. You can enable it from the Account page if needed.
startDay.balanceError: Please enter a valid opening balance.

endDay.title: End day
endDay.description: Close the POS for today. New orders will be blocked until a new day is started.
endDay.balanceDescription: Enter the cash count or final balance before closing.
endDay.balanceError: Please enter a valid closing balance.
endDay.confirmDescription: Close the pos and end the day

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Review the order and complete payment.

modal.title: Complete order
modal.description: Review the order summary before finalizing the sale.

success.title: Order completed
success.descriptionWithPrinting: The order has been completed and is ready for printing.
success.descriptionWithoutPrinting: The order has been completed and saved.
success.bannerDescriptionWithPrinting: You can print the tickets now or start a new order.
success.bannerDescriptionWithoutPrinting: You can continue with the next order when ready.
